summary: Iteration 2 - Verified datetime bug fix and Promise.allSettled in Dashboard.jsx. 23/23 backend pytest tests pass (added 4 new regression tests for YYYY-MM-DD format on /api/dashboard/stats and /api/reminders). Full E2E UI flow PASS: created property via UI with YYYY-MM-DD date -> stats updated from ₹6.49L to ₹72.22L (appreciation calculated correctly) -> tenant/expense/utility/tax added -> 3 reminders rendered (overdue utility with YYYY-MM-DD due_date works) -> both CSV exports downloaded. Critical bug from iteration_1 is fully resolved.

design_issues.screen: All Add* dialogs (Property, Tenant, Expense, Utility)
issues: Uses native browser HTML5 date picker (input type='date') instead of shadcn Calendar/Popover component - inconsistent with rest of shadcn-based UI
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility issue; add DialogDescription to each DialogContent

Benign 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' triggers CRA dev-error overlay which blocks user interaction during dev. Production build should be unaffected, but consider adding global suppression in index.js to improve dev experience.

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription to each Add* dialog to fix a11y console warnings
(Optional) Replace native date inputs with shadcn Calendar+Popover component for visual consistency
(Optional) Suppress benign ResizeObserver dev-overlay errors in development
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 495 lines - approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting routes into modules (properties, tenants, expenses, utilities, taxes, dashboard) as features grow

Property/Tenant/Expense/UtilityPayment/PropertyTax all store dates as `str` fields. Mixing ISO-with-tz and YYYY-MM-DD inputs is now handled in dashboard/reminders, but other future date comparisons may hit the same naive-datetime bug. Consider standardising to store as `datetime` (Pydantic) and let Pydantic serialise, or apply the same tzinfo guard wherever fromisoformat is used.
BASE_URL fallback added in test_api.py reads /app/frontend/.env when env var is not exported (test runner doesn't auto-load it). Working as intended.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (added TestDateFormatRegression class with 4 tests; added .env fallback)
seed_data_creation: E2E test created: 1 property (E2E_Townhouse_*), 1 tenant, 1 expense, 1 utility (overdue), 1 tax record. Pytest creates and cleans up TEST_ prefixed data automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical datetime bug from iteration_1 is fixed and regression-tested. /api/dashboard/stats and /api/reminders now correctly handle both YYYY-MM-DD and ISO-with-tz date formats. Dashboard.jsx uses Promise.allSettled. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covers all endpoints + regression scenarios. Database currently retains E2E_Townhouse_* property and a few associated records from UI test run.
rca_of_iteration_1_issue: Root cause: backend stored purchase_date/due_date as raw strings from UI. UI sent YYYY-MM-DD (no timezone), so datetime.fromisoformat() returned a naive datetime. Comparing naive datetime with datetime.now(timezone.utc) raised TypeError -> 500. Fix verified: server.py lines 369-372 and 413-417 add `if dt.tzinfo is None: dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)` guard before comparison.
